name: USS Ramsay (DM 16)
events: 16 Oct 1944 During 16/17 October 1944, the submarines USS Skipjack (T/Cdr. R.S. Andrews, USN), USS Swordfish (T/Cdr. K.E. Montross, USN), USS Albacore (T/Lt.Cdr. H.R. Rimmer, USN), USS Peto (T/Cdr. R.H. Caldwell, Jr., USN), USS Dragonet (T/Cdr. J.H. Lewis, USN) all conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor. These included night exercises. Also participating in these exercises were the destroyer minelayer USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR) and the destroyer escorts USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Hemminger (Lt.Cdr. J.R. Bodler, USNR).

20 Oct 1944 USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) and USS Pipefish (T/Cdr. W.N. Deragon, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR).

8 Dec 1944 Around 0700 M/8, USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) departed from Majuro for her 2nd war patrol. She was ordered to patrol in the East China Sea as part of a coordinated attack group which was further made up of USS Spot (T/Cdr. W.S. Post, Jr., USN) and USS Balao (T/Cdr. M.R. de Arellano, USN).
She was escorted out until 1115 L/8, by USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR).

10 Dec 1944 Around 1345 M/10, USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) ended her 1st war patrol at Majuro. She was escorted in by USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR) which had joined around 0945 M/10.
She was taken in hand for refit by USS USS Howard W. Gilmore (T/Capt. D.N. Cone, Jr., USN). Refit was completed on 25 December 1944. (2)
27 Dec 1944 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted independent exercises off Majuro during which she was escorted by USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR).

31 Dec 1944 While exercising off Majuro, USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) reported sighting a possible periscope which was considered to be from an enemy submarine. USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR) and USS Brackett (Lt.Cdr. A.C. Reed, Jr., USNR) searched the area which continued until the following day. No enemy submarine was detected though. (3)

31 Dec 1944 USS Sargo (T/Lt.Cdr. J.M. Hingson, USN), USS Pompon (T/Cdr. S.H. Gimber, USN), USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN), USS Atule (T/Cdr. J.H. Maurer, USN) and USS Spadefish (T/Cdr. G.W. Underwood, USN) conducted exercises off Majuro with USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR) and USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN).
The exercises were broken off when USS Jallao reported seeing a periscope which was thought to be from an enemy submarine.

1 Jan 1945 During 1 and 2 January USS Pompon (T/Cdr. S.H. Gimber, USN), USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN), USS Atule (T/Cdr. J.H. Maurer, USN) and USS Spadefish (T/Cdr. G.W. Underwood, USN) conducted exercises off Majuro with USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR) and USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN). (4)

6 Jan 1945 Around 0930 M/6, USS Pompon (T/Cdr. S.H. Gimber, USN), USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN), USS Atule (T/Cdr. J.H. Maurer, USN) and USS Spadefish (T/Cdr. G.W. Underwood, USN) got underway from Majuro for their 7th, 2nd, 2nd and 3rd war patrols respectively. The submarines were to proceed to Saipan first to top off with fuel and provisions before proceeding to their patrol area in the Yellow Sea. They were escorted out until around 1420 M/6, by USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR).
At 1615 M/6, USS Spadefish was mistaken for an enemy submarine by two friendly fighter aircraft and bombed after having dived. Some minor damage was caused. (5)
1 Feb 1945 USS Chub (Cdr. C.D. Rhymes, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR).

2 Feb 1945 USS Chub (Cdr. C.D. Rhymes, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR), USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR) and USS Tench (Cdr. W.B. Sieglaff, USN).

3 Feb 1945 USS Chub (Cdr. C.D. Rhymes, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR), USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR) and USS Tench (Cdr. W.B. Sieglaff, USN).
7 Feb 1945 USS Chub (Cdr. C.D. Rhymes, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR) and USS PC-599 (Lt. J.M. Kindt, USNR).
8 Feb 1945 USS Chub (Cdr. C.D. Rhymes, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR) and USS PC-599 (Lt. J.M. Kindt, USNR).
9 Feb 1945 USS Chub (Cdr. C.D. Rhymes, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR) and USS PC-599 (Lt. J.M. Kindt, USNR).
